name: Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ Adapter (90W)
title: Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ Adapter (90W)
short_description: Buy Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ Adapter (90W). Price from 48.09 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option. ☎ +371 60 000 888.
description:
The Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ Adapter is designed to deliver high power and high speed connectivity for demanding network devices. With support for up to 90W of PoE+++, it provides sufficient power for advanced UniFi equipment such as high performance access points, cameras, and other PoE powered devices. This allows installations to operate independently of PoE switch limitations, offering greater flexibility in network design. The adapter supports a wide input voltage range of 100 to 240V AC and operates at a frequency of 50 or 60 Hz, ensuring compatibility with global power standards. It delivers a stable output of 54V DC at 1.67A, maintaining consistent power delivery to connected devices. High efficiency above 88% helps reduce energy loss and improves overall system performance.

For network connectivity, the device includes a shielded RJ45 interface for data input and PoE output, supporting reliable multi gigabit data transmission alongside power delivery. The use of four pair powering ensures efficient energy distribution across all cable pairs, optimizing performance for high power applications. Its compact design makes it suitable for a wide range of deployment scenarios, from desktop installations to structured network setups. By combining high power output with stable data connectivity, the adapter provides a reliable solution for powering modern network devices.

The Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ Adapter is engineered with advanced protection mechanisms to ensure safe and reliable operation in professional environments. It features comprehensive surge protection, including a maximum surge discharge capacity of 1500A for power lines and peak pulse current protection for data signals. These capabilities help protect both the adapter and connected devices from electrical disturbances. Additional safeguards include overcurrent protection and fast response times of less than one nanosecond, ensuring immediate reaction to unexpected electrical events. The device also maintains low output ripple levels and stable line and load regulation, supporting consistent and reliable power delivery even under varying conditions.

Designed for real world environments, the adapter operates within a temperature range of 0 to 40° C and supports humidity levels from 10 to 95% noncondensing. It is built to maintain performance across a wide range of conditions, making it suitable for both commercial and industrial installations. The unit includes a status LED indicator for quick visual monitoring, allowing users to easily check operational status. Its compact and lightweight construction, combined with support for multiple mounting options, enables flexible installation in different environments. With its combination of durability, protection features, and efficient power delivery, the adapter provides a dependable solution for high power PoE applications.
